qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Apache Camel Exec Component - Command Injection via Unsanitized Message Headers
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: Targets camel-exec message headers and Apache Commons Exec command construction, not camel-leveldb DefaultLevelDBSerializer deserialization of LevelDB aggregation repository records.

qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Apache Camel Jackson DataFormat - Denial of Service via Unbounded String Deserialization
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: Targets camel-jackson JSON string parsing limits and memory exhaustion, not unsafe Java ObjectInputStream use in camel-leveldb DefaultLevelDBSerializer.

qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Apache Camel Netty/MINA Components - Unsafe Java Deserialization
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: Shares the broad unsafe Java deserialization class, but identifies NettyConverter/MinaConverter network payload deserialization rather than DefaultLevelDBSerializer reading attacker-written LevelDB aggregation repository data.

target_advisory_judgement.reason: No final qualifying finding identifies the advisory-described camel-leveldb DefaultLevelDBSerializer root cause. The advisory concerns ObjectInputStream deserialization of attacker-written LevelDB aggregation repository bytes without ObjectInputFilter or class-loading restrictions; the final qualifying findings target camel-exec command construction, camel-jackson JSON resource exhaustion, and camel-netty/MINA network object conversion.
evidence: Advisory GHSA-429q-mrc4-38fr names org.apache.camel:camel-leveldb and DefaultLevelDBSerializer deserializing LevelDB aggregation repository data with java.io.ObjectInputStream without filtering.
camel-exec-command-injection/vulnerability_report.json reports DefaultExecBinding and DefaultExecCommandExecutor handling CamelExecCommand* headers, a different component and sink.
camel-jackson-dos/vulnerability_report.json reports AbstractJacksonDataFormat maxStringLength defaults and Jackson JSON parsing, a different component and impact.
camel-netty-deserialization/vulnerability_report.json reports NettyConverter.toObjectInput and MinaConverter.toObjectInput over TCP/UDP messages, not LevelDB repository file deserialization.
